startups.name: PulseGrid

signals.content: Founders reported repeat weekly usage from 40 stores.

OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano. MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.
